title: NoticeToProceed
description: A Notice to Proceed / Decision Document ISSUED BY OER — the determination, at the 'Notice To Proceed/Decision Document' step of the OER Remedial Process, that a site's Remedial Action Work Plan is approved and remedial construction may begin. This is the READ-side record of an OER determination (distinct from notice-to-proceed-request.json, the net-new WRITE by which an owner/developer requests one). Related OER determinations use the same shape: Notice of No Objection (NNO), Notice of Satisfaction (NOS). Today these documents live only in the EPIC project portal (a002-epic.nyc.gov) and the per-site document repository — there is no OER API.

noticeId.description: OER's identifier for the issued determination document.

oerProjectNumber.description: The OER project this determination belongs to.

eDesignation.description: The (E)-designation number cleared by this determination, if applicable.

documentUrl.description: Link to the issued determination document in the OER document repository / EPIC.
